query: Making cold brew and getting ready for a short call. I am sitting on the couch so tune the house. Power up AC 1 in the living room 8 minutes from now set to cooling and fan 60%. Also set refrigerator 1 in the kitchen to temp 1.0°C 22 minutes from now and 21 minutes after the previous action raise it to temp 5.0°C so the brew chills fast and the fridge returns to safe temps.

steps.thought: First, verify current time, get rooms, and devices for living room and kitchen.
Get rooms to verify IDs, then get devices for living room and kitchen.
Get devices in living room and kitchen, and environment control rules for temperature.
Get kitchen devices and environment control rules.
Get device structure for AC and refrigerator, and environment control rules for temperature.
Need refrigerator structure and temperature control rules.
I have the current time, rooms, devices, and structures. Now I will schedule three workflows: AC start at 2025-08-23 10:30:32, fridge first at 10:44:32, fridge second at 11:05:32.
Schedule first fridge step at 10:44:32 to set temperature to 1.0°C (100 hundredths)
Schedule second fridge step at 11:05:32 to set to 5.0°C (500 hundredths) and return to Normal mode.
All three workflows have been scheduled successfully. The AC will start at 10:30, fridge cool to 1°C at 10:44, then raise to 5°C at 11:05.

action_input.answer:
I have scheduled the following tasks:
1. At 10:30:32, living room AC 1 will be turned on with cooling mode and fan at 60%.
2. At 10:44:32, kitchen refrigerator 1 will be set to Rapid Cool mode and temperature set to 1.0°C.
3. At 11:05:32, refrigerator will return to Normal mode and temperature set to 5.0°C.
Enjoy your cold brew and call!
